title: Why Muscle Loss After 40 Is Sabotaging Your Metabolism (And How to Stop It)
seo_title: Muscle Loss After 40 in Women: Why It Happens and How to Stop It
meta_description: Muscle loss after 40 slows your metabolism and drives weight gain. Learn how sarcopenia works, the estrogen connection, and the two non-negotiables to stop it.
tags: muscle loss, sarcopenia, metabolism, women over 40, protein, resistance training, lean muscle formula
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: Women begin losing muscle in their 30s and the rate accelerates after 40, quietly slowing metabolism and making weight management harder. Here is what the science says about stopping and reversing it.
